passages.passage_text:
Directions: Study the following information carefully and answer the questions given below it:
Six members A, B, C, D, E and F and five girls P, Q, R, S and T, a team of six is to be selected under the following conditions:
(1) A and D have to be together.
(2) C cannot go with S.
(3) S and T have to be together.
(4) B cannot be teamed with E.
(5) D cannot go with P.
(6) B and R have to be together.
(7) C and Q have to be together.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If there are five boys in the team, the only girl member is
(a) P    (b) Q    (c) R    (d) S

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If, including P, the team has three girls, the members other than P are
(a) ADEQST    (b) ADEST    (c) ABEST    (d) BFQST

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If the team including C consists of four boys, the members of the team other than C are
(a) ABFQR    (b) AAROQR    (c) DEFAQ    (d) BERQ

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If four members including E have to be boys, the members other than E are
(a) ACDPQ    (b) ABCDST    (c) ACDPQ    (d) ACDPQ

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If four members have to be girls, the members of the team are
(a) BFPRST    (b) BFPRST    (c) BECQRST    (d) BECPQRT
